summary: REQ-10 appears implemented: the No button is now fixed-positioned and repositions to a random in-viewport (x,y) after each successful click while preserving evasive move-away behavior on pointer enter/mousedown and continuing to call the existing onNo callback that increments the escalating prompt sequence. Viewport bounds are accounted for using the button’s measured width/height, with mobile-friendly sizing via visualViewport when available.
